hero.title: Smarter Lawns, Effortlessly
hero.subtitle: Robotic mowing, professional installation, and year-round care for your property.

footer.rights: DS SmartLawn Service LLC. All rights reserved.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: From first visit to year-round care — we handle every step.

items.name: On-Site Assessment
items.desc: We walk your lawn, measure terrain, check WiFi, and recommend the right robot — free, no obligation.

items.name: Installation & Setup
items.desc: RTK base station, lawn mapping, no-go zones, and tuning to your terrain.

items.name: Seasonal Maintenance
items.desc: Blade changes, cleaning, diagnostics and firmware updates throughout the season.

items.name: Repair
items.desc: Fast local repair for mowers and base stations — one call away.

items.name: Winterization
items.desc: End-of-season cleaning, safe storage, and spring-ready prep.

membership.title: SmartLawn Membership
membership.subtitle: Keep your robotic mower running like new — all season, every season.

rental.title: Rent or Try First
rental.subtitle: Try a robotic mower on your own lawn before you commit.

tiers.name: Weekend Trial
tiers.desc: A full weekend on your own lawn. Fee applies toward purchase.

tiers.name: Monthly Rental
tiers.desc: Month-to-month rental with full support and maintenance.

tiers.name: Rent-to-Own
tiers.desc: Rental fees apply toward purchase — own it when you're ready.

about.title: About DS SmartLawn
about.body: We're a small, locally owned team based in Eastern Massachusetts. We sell, install, and service robotic lawnmowers for large yards, hobby farms, and country properties.
about.promise: Every customer matters, every install gets our full attention, and every problem gets a personal response. We'd rather earn one neighbor at a time than chase scale we can't deliver on.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Lawn care tips and product guides.

book.title: Book a Free On-Site Assessment
book.subtitle: No pressure, no obligation. Tell us about your lawn and we’ll come take a look.
book.typeTitle: What would you like to book?
book.type_standard_desc: We schedule an on-site visit, confirmed within 1–2 weeks.
book.type_demo_day_desc: Visit our demo yard this Saturday, 10 AM–2 PM.
book.type_same_day_desc: We’re already in your town this week — book a swing-by.
